description: L++ schema/load validation of a blueprint (layer 1 of the backbone preflight)
rules: read-only on the target — writes only the structured report into RECORD_STORE
fail-closed: a missing prover binary is status=fail (missing_tool), never a silent skip or pass
deterministic structured JSON out — the report IS the certificate the ledger records
usage: Set TARGET_BLUEPRINT (path to a lpp/v0.2.0 blueprint JSON). Output: backbone_validate.json {status,id,error}.
limitation: Schema/load level only — run tlc + tlaps perks (or preflight) for the solver layers.
